task_description: Fix smoke tests to properly detect and fail on HTTP errors (404+) and console errors. Tests currently pass incorrectly when navigating to non-existent routes.

patterns.error_detection: Use page.on('console') for console errors and page.on('response') for network errors. Attach BEFORE navigation.
patterns.network_failure: HTTP status >= 400 is a failure, store in NetworkRequest interface format
patterns.console_error: Only msg.type() === 'error' triggers failure, stored as string[]
patterns.test_result_storage: TestResult has consoleErrors and networkRequests JSON fields already

existing_implementations.description: test-generator.ts already generates correct error detection code, but runner.ts executeLine() doesn't execute page.on() handlers
existing_implementations.root_cause: executeLine() only handles goto, locator, and screenshot commands - skips page.on() event listeners
